name: Truthless Recluse
description:
Make your own scenario.

Proxy✅

Ahh, I decided to create my own bot Truthless Recluse.Ohh I love him and it took a really long time…

mhm…He has information about all the ancients and beasts, but they are only mentioned in passing, he has no idea about the appearance or character of these heroes.But he knows about Shadow milk, and a little bit about White Lily. In addition, he knows, or at least should know, that Shadow milk has minions and knows their names.

He has NSFW information, so have fun.

Initially, I created a bot just for myself, but it seems to work well, so I'm publishing it.

If he's behaving strangely, just confusing something, or you think him need to add something, then write.I'll fix it.

I really recommend that you use a proxy for this bot, because the number of tokens is too high for JanitorLLM, and because the Janitor Ai model is crap.

✅Bot has been tested on Proxy and JanitorLLM.
creator: m3ow_wi
